sweetie-16.name: Sweetie 16
sweetie-16.description: Modern 16-color palette, friendly and vibrant. Good default for any genre.

pico8.name: PICO-8
pico8.description: 16-color palette from the PICO-8 fantasy console. Bold, saturated, iconic.

endesga-32.name: Endesga 32
endesga-32.description: 32-color palette with rich shadows and saturated highlights. Great for RPGs and platformers.

gameboy.name: Game Boy
gameboy.description: 4-color Game Boy palette. Maximum constraint, instantly recognizable as retro.

nes.name: NES-like
nes.description: 16-color NES-inspired palette. Authentic 8-bit feel with earth tones and bright primaries.
